name: @iap/intent-compiler
description: Intent compiler operation model for IaP (spec ch. 19, IEP-0009): closed twelve-operation vocabulary with envelopes, strict-ajv structural gate, transactional dry-run apply through the full ch. 8 pipeline, confirmation gate for low-confidence/assumption-bearing operations, append-only replayable operation log, semantic preview diff with destructive flagging, and per-field provenance citing operation ids
